heading: Tonight
text: Showers mixing with snow in the north, diminishing from the west to east overnight. Lows in the 30s, nearing 40 south. Light northwest wind.

heading: Saturday
text: Periods of clouds giving way to increasing sunshine, with clouds sticking around a bit longer in the northeast. Highs in the 40s north, upper 40s to mid 50s south. Northwest wind at 10 to 15 mph, gusting to near 20 mph.

heading: Saturday Night
text: A few clouds in the northeast clearing out after midnight. Lows from the mid 20s to low 30s. Light northwest wind.
